name: Jonas Construction Software ERP API
what_it_does: Jonas Construction Software integrated construction ERP REST API for construction accounting, job costing, service management, and project operations for general contractors, specialty subcontractors, and service contractors. Enables AI agents to manage job cost tracking and budget vs actual reporting for construction cost control automation, handle accounts payable and subcontractor payment workflow for construction financial automation, access payroll and union wage calculation for construction workforce payroll automation, retrieve certified payroll and prevailing wage reporting for public works compliance automation, manage service dispatch and work order management for service contractor operations automation, handle equipment cost tracking and maintenance scheduling for fleet and equipment automation, access document management and project photo for construction documentation automation, retrieve financial reporting and WIP (work in progress) schedule for construction financial intelligence, manage customer billing and progress billing for construction invoice automation, and integrate Jonas with Procore, Trimble, and banking platforms for construction ERP ecosystem connectivity.
use_cases: Tracking job costs from construction cost control agents
Processing subcontractor payments from AP automation agents
Running certified payroll from prevailing wage agents
Dispatching service calls from field service agents
not_for: Large ENR top-400 GC enterprise (use Viewpoint Vista or Sage 300 CRE)
BIM model coordination and design (use Autodesk or Trimble Connect)
Heavy civil and infrastructure megaproject controls
best_when: A mid-market general contractor, specialty subcontractor, or service contractor in Canada or the US wanting AI agents to automate job costing, payroll, subcontractor AP, certified payroll, service dispatch, and financial reporting within Jonas as the construction ERP.
avoid_when: CERTIFIED PAYROLL PREVAILING WAGE ACCURACY FOR PUBLIC WORKS: Automated certified payroll generation via Jonas must apply correct prevailing wage rates for each trade classification and jurisdiction; automated certified payroll filing with incorrect wage rates creates Davis-Bacon Act violation, debarment risk, and back wage liability. UNION FRINGE BENEFIT CALCULATION ACCURACY: Automated payroll processing for union construction workers must correctly calculate all fringe benefit contributions (health, pension, training, vacation) per applicable collective bargaining agreement; automated fringe benefit shortfall creates union grievance and CBA breach. WIP SCHEDULE ACCURACY FOR BONDING AND BANKING: Automated WIP (work in progress) schedule generation in Jonas must use accurate percent complete and estimated cost to complete; automated WIP reporting with inflated percent complete creates bonding fraud and banking covenant misrepresentation exposure.

auth.notes: Jonas Construction uses API key and OAuth authentication. REST API with JSON. Toronto, Ontario HQ (Jonas Software, a Constellation Software company). Constellation Software (TSX: CSU) is a permanent capital acquirer of vertical market software. Jonas Software division includes construction, hospitality, fitness, and other verticals. Jonas Construction targets mid-market Canadian and US GC, specialty sub, and service contractors. Competes with Viewpoint, Sage 300 CRE, and Foundation Software for construction ERP.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-user annual subscription with module licensing
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription per user; core accounting, job costing, payroll, service modules; implementation professional services
pricing.notes: Toronto ON. Constellation Software TSX:CSU subsidiary. Mid-market GC/sub/service contractor focus. Canadian and US market. Per-user annual subscription with module licensing.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; job cost and payroll API throttled for data integrity; no webhooks — requires polling

known_agent_gotchas: NO WEBHOOKS — ALL EVENTS REQUIRE POLLING: Jonas Construction does not support native webhooks for job cost updates, AP approvals, or payroll events; automated construction ERP workflows require scheduled polling aligned with daily accounting cycles and weekly payroll runs

CERTIFIED PAYROLL WAGE DETERMINATION ACCURACY: Automated certified payroll generation must apply jurisdiction-specific Davis-Bacon wage determinations (US federal) or provincial prevailing wage schedules (Canada); Jonas wage tables must be maintained current; automated certified payroll with stale wage rates creates regulatory filing violation

WIP SCHEDULE PERCENT COMPLETE DATA INTEGRITY: Automated WIP schedule generation for bonding and banking reporting requires project manager-confirmed percent complete estimates; automated WIP based on cost-to-date percentage without PM review creates WIP schedule inaccuracy with bonding and lender covenant implications

Constellation Software product investment posture — Jonas Construction is a Constellation Software permanent capital acquisition; Constellation's model is stable maintenance, not high-growth investment; API development pace may be conservative; evaluate API feature roadmap carefully before building automation that requires advanced API capabilities

Canadian payroll compliance — automated Jonas payroll for Canadian workers must handle provincial payroll tax (CPP, EI, provincial income tax) plus Quebec-specific deductions (QPIP, QPP) correctly; Jonas Canada payroll configuration must be validated by Canadian payroll professional before automated payroll processing

Union multi-trade fringe benefit complexity — automated payroll for union construction workers across multiple trades (carpenters, electricians, laborers) requires trade-specific fringe benefit contribution rates per CBA; Jonas union fringe table maintenance is manual; automated payroll without current CBA fringe tables creates union trust fund shortfall
agent_readiness.security_notes: Construction ERP. SOC2. API key/OAuth. US/CA. Job cost, payroll, and financial data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Construction ERP. SOC2. API key/OAuth. US/CA. Payroll, financial, and job cost data.
